page_title: Cotton Fluorescent Pique Fabric - ArShirt Neo - Ariteks
spec_line: 220 g/m², 100% Cotton, Pique, High Visible Knit Fabric
description_blocks: ArShirt Neo is 100% cotton pique knit fabric with neon fluorescent colors. Arıteks developed a new process to dye 100% cotton with fluorescent colors.

technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Cotton (CO) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 20/1 Ne Combed EN ISO 2060 Weight 220 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1800 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa(kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 3 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 3 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 3 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 3-4 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application T-Shirt Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Technical Documents >> ArShirt Neo Data Sheet Certificates

220 g/m² , 100% Cotton, Pique, High Visible Knit Fabric

ArShirt Neo is 100% cotton pique knit fabric with neon fluorescent colors. Arıteks developed a new process to dye 100% cotton with fluorescent colors. Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Cotton (CO) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 20/1 Ne Combed EN ISO 2060 Weight 220 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1800 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa(kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 3 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 3 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 3 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 3-4 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application T-Shirt Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Technical Documents >> ArShirt Neo Data Sheet Certificates
